mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, dept_id, status, avatar, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, del_flag FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, dept_id, status, avatar, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, del_flag FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, dept_id, status, avatar, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, del_flag FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = '0'

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = '0' AND m.status = '0' AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
